features: Two Sets, Four Clips Included – You’ll receive 2 sets with 2 clips each, total of 4 mini butterfly hair clips. Each piece is finished in a pearlescent sheen, adding sparkle and charm to your hair, perfect for creating chic everyday looks.

Playful Butterfly Design – These butterfly hair clips are styled with a glossy pearlescent finish, designed as small butterfly hair clips that bring light and detail to ponytails, braids, buns, or loose waves.

Lightweight & Secure Hold – Crafted as mini hair clips, these accessories are durable and gentle, giving a comfortable yet reliable grip. Perfect for pinning back fringes or sections while remaining stylish throughout the day.

Versatile Styling Accessories – From casual days to special occasions, these mini hair claw clips adapt to every style. Add a playful touch whether you’re at school, work, on holiday, or out for the evening.

Confidence in Every Look – More than just butterfly clips for hair, this set of butterfly claw clips are joyful accessories that highlight personality, encourage self-expression, and complete your chic everyday routine.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page From Clips to Combs – Your Daily Hair Essentials in One Chic Collection! 4pk Small Butterfly Clips Add To Basket 8pk Fruit Butterfly Clips Add To Basket 12pk Patterned Bobbles Buying Options 200pk Hold Hair Grips Add To Basket Pink Hair Towel Wrap Add To Basket 5pk Hair Brush Set Buying Options 2pk Head Lice Combs Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 1 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 — — 3.8 out of 5 stars 221 4.4 out of 5 stars 373 4.0 out of 5 stars 81 Price £4.59 £ 4 . 59 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £5.29 £ 5 . 29 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 — £4.29 £ 4 . 29 Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact & Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Designed for Grooming ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Home Use Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Gentle on Hair ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What’s included in the 4pk pearlescent butterfly set? Two sets of 2 – 4 mini claw clips in butterfly shapes: 1× clover (2 cm/1.3 g) and 1× square (2.5 cm/1.7 g) per set. Lightweight PP with a gentle, non-slip grip for quick styling at home, work, parties or holidays. Who are these mini clips best for? Designed for girls and women, they suit fine to medium strands; for thicker hair, stack two or pair with an elastic. Ideal as a stylish barrette accent, fringe tamer, or section holder for everyday looks. How do I style with the mini claw clips? Press to open, slide into place, release to lock. Pin back fringes, frame a braid, highlight a bun, or create half-up looks. Pearlescent finish adds subtle shimmer that complements outfits from day to night. Will they stay comfortable all day? Yes. The tiny non-slip teeth provide a secure hold without tugging. Compact sizes (2 cm and 2.5 cm) keep styles neat while remaining light enough for all-day wear at school, the office or on holiday. How should I care for and store them? Wipe with a soft dry cloth; avoid heat, sprays and moisture. Store in a pouch to protect the finish and springs. Keep out of reach of small children. With gentle care, your butterfly hair clips stay chic.
